title: Document ID not found in HTTP request
symptom: The HTTP request node fails with an error indicating that the document ID does not exist, showing the placeholder instead of the actual value.
applies_when: Task ID is dynamically generated from a previous node
not_this_if: Document ID is correctly set in the previous node
Task ID is not being used
root_cause: The error occurs because the Foxit PDF-Services API is asynchronous. When a task is created, it returns a task ID without fully validating the task, leading to a situation where the document ID is not yet available when the HTTP request is made.
fix_steps: Ensure that the task is fully completed before making the HTTP request
Check the status of the task to confirm it has a valid document ID
If necessary, recreate the task after uploading the file
agent_instruction: Verify the task status and ensure the document ID is available before making the HTTP request.
